basic_details.job_title: IIM Bangalore Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore) Chief Operating Officer – Mizuho India Japan Study Centre (MJSC) Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website iimb.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Bangalore Chief Operating Officer – Mizuho India Japan Study Centre (MJSC) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate, Senior/top management assignments in industry, Familiarity or working experience with Japanese companies (advantage)
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree. Proven experience in handling senior/top management assignments in industry. Familiarity or working experience with Japanese companies will be an advantage.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bangalore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Bangalore Chief Operating Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Chief Operating Officer position at IIM Bangalore is 18th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Chief Operating Officer post?
faq.answer: The indicative salary for the Chief Operating Officer position is ₹30.00 Lakhs per annum. This compensation reflects the senior management level of the role.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree and have experience in senior or top management assignments in industry. Familiarity with Japanese companies is considered an advantage.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Chief Operating Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves shortlisting of eligible candidates. Further stages, if any, will be communicated by the institute.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Chief Operating Officer position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Bangalore or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Chief Operating Officer position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IIMB/HR/RECT/2026/34.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Chief Operating Officer post is Bangalore, Karnataka.
